sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Flip Front ("we", "our") is a mobile app of games to use with friends. We take the privacy of your data very seriously.

sections.title: 2. Data collected
paragraphs: Flip Front is designed to work without collecting any personally identifiable data.
• Locally stored data: the player names you enter are saved only on your device (via local storage) and are never transmitted to our servers.
• Anonymous technical data: in case of an error, anonymized reports may be sent to our monitoring tool (Sentry) to improve app stability. These reports contain no personally identifiable information.
• In-app purchases: transactions are handled directly by Apple (App Store) or Google (Play Store). We do not collect or store any payment information.

sections.title: 3. Data not collected
paragraphs: Flip Front does not collect:
• Your name, email or phone number
• Your contacts, photos or location
• Your advertising identifiers
• Any behavioral data sold to third parties

sections.title: 4. Data sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell, rent or share any data with third parties for advertising or commercial purposes.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
paragraphs: Under GDPR, you can at any time:
• Delete player names from the app (delete button or uninstall)
• Uninstall the app to remove all local data

sections.title: 6. Security
paragraphs: Since data stays on your device, its security depends on your device's. We recommend protecting it with a passcode.

sections.title: 7. Minors
paragraphs: Flip Front is strictly reserved for adults (18 and over). The app contains recurring adult themes, references to alcohol and mature questions, matching the 17+ rating (App Store) and PEGI 18 / ESRB Mature rating (Google Play). It is not intended for minors.

sections.title: 8. Changes
paragraphs: This policy may be updated. The date of the latest update is shown at the top of the document.

sections.title: 9. Contact
paragraphs: For any question: info@flip-flop.app

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
paragraphs: By downloading and using the Flip Front app, you fully accept these terms of use.

sections.title: 2. Service description
paragraphs: Flip Front is a mobile app offering a selection of social games to play with friends (party games, vibe games, quizzes). The app is intended for personal, non-commercial recreational use.

sections.title: 3. Minimum age
paragraphs: Use of Flip Front is strictly reserved for adults (18 and over). The app contains recurring adult themes, references to alcohol and mature questions. It is rated 17+ on the App Store and PEGI 18 / ESRB Mature on Google Play.
By using the app, you declare that you are at least 18 years old. Any use by a minor is prohibited and falls under the sole responsibility of their legal guardian.

sections.title: 4. Responsible drinking
paragraphs: Some games include a "drinks" mode for humorous purposes. Flip Front encourages responsible alcohol consumption. Alcohol abuse is dangerous to your health. Never play while driving. The publishers disclaim any liability for unreasonable use of the drinks mode.

sections.title: 5. In-app purchases
paragraphs: Flip Front offers premium features available through a one-time purchase or subscription, handled by the App Store or Google Play Store. Refund conditions are those of Apple or Google. Any claim must be addressed to the relevant platform.

sections.title: 6. Acceptable use
paragraphs: You agree to:
• Not use Flip Front for illegal or harmful purposes
• Not attempt to copy, modify, disassemble or decompile the app
• Not enter illegal, defamatory or rights-infringing content (especially in player names)

sections.title: 7. Intellectual property
paragraphs: The app, its name, logo, design, texts and all its content (questions, scenarios, illustrations) are the exclusive property of the publisher. Any reproduction is forbidden without prior authorization.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: Flip Front is provided "as is", with no warranty of any kind. The publisher cannot be held liable for:
• Bugs, interruptions or service unavailability
• Direct or indirect damages resulting from use of the app
• Consequences of unreasonable use of the games (in particular the drinks mode)

sections.title: 9. Content
paragraphs: Some app content may include adult themes, off-beat humor or references to alcohol consumption. This content is intended for a mature audience.

sections.title: 10. Service changes
paragraphs: The publisher reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue all or part of the app at any time and without notice.

sections.title: 11. Changes to the terms
paragraphs: These terms may be modified at any time. Your continued use of the app after a change means acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 12. Applicable law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute will fall under the competent courts of France.

sections.title: 13. Contact
paragraphs: For any question: info@flip-flop.app

sections.title: 6. Personal data
paragraphs: The processing of personal data is detailed in the Privacy Policy.
